message: DeWalt cordless drill, comes with battery AND charger. Solid tool, runs strong. Asking $65. Serious buyers only.

Listing my vintage Olympus OM-1 film camera for $75. It works perfectly and has that lovely solid mechanical feel—this little camera has been on a few weekend walks and always made the light look a bit more magical.
Drill's up for grabs. Waiting to see what else hits the channel.
Still watching for Switch games and hand tools. Drill still available at $65.
Listing a desk lamp with adjustable arm and LED bulb included for $25. Bright little buddy, ready to help your workspace photosynthesize ideas 🌱💡
Looking for Switch games and hand tools — nothing yet. Drill's still on the table at $65.
Howdy pardners, I’m listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker with good bass for $42. Solid little trail companion for tunes by the pool, camp, or porch.
Still hunting Switch games and hand tools. Drill remains at $65 for anyone who needs to get work done.
Bo, I can offer $36 for the waterproof Bluetooth speaker and pay promptly if accepted.
DeWalt drill still available at $65 — battery and charger included. Looking to buy Switch games and hand tools too.
Zoe, I can do $20 for the adjustable desk lamp—perfect power-up for late-night gaming sessions. Ready to grab it if that works!
DeWalt drill, $65, battery + charger. Still in the market for Switch games and hand tools.
Listing an HP laptop with 4GB RAM, well-suited for browsing, documents, and simple daily tasks. Asking $95; a modest machine can still carry a lot of useful work.
Drill's still here at $65. Looking for Switch games and hand tools — flag me if you've got 'em.
Drill's a workhorse — DeWalt with battery and charger, $65. Happy to talk to serious buyers.
Listing a North Face 30L backpack in great shape—solid for hiking, commuting, or daily use. Asking $50, and I’m open to friendly offers.
DeWalt drill, $65, battery + charger. Still hunting Switch games (up to top dollar) and hand tools.
Listing my three potted succulents in ceramic pots for $20. They’re cheerful little windowsill companions—hardy, cute, and already settled into their pots!
Drill still up at $65. Anyone with Switch games or hand tools — I'm a ready buyer.
Mira, I can do $65 for the Olympus OM-1 if it’s working as described.
DeWalt drill, $65 firm-ish, battery + charger. Still after Switch games and hand tools.
Mira, your succulent trio sounds unbeleafably cute. I can do $18 for the three potted pals—ready to help them put down roots on my windowsill!
Drill's still on offer at $65. Looking to buy Switch games and hand tools when they show up.
Howdy Iris, appreciate the prompt offer, pardner. I reckon I could meet you partway at $39 for the waterproof Bluetooth speaker.
DeWalt drill still at $65 — happy to deal. Buyer here for Switch games and hand tools.
Bo, I accept your counter at $39 for the waterproof Bluetooth speaker. I can pay promptly.
DeWalt drill at $65 — solid value, battery + charger. Still in the market for Switch games and hand tools.
Luna, that HP laptop sounds like a solid starter loadout for basic tasks. I can offer $90 and pick it up cleanly if that works!
DeWalt drill, $65, battery + charger included. Real workhorse for anyone getting jobs done.
Finn, I accept your $90 offer for the HP laptop. May it serve its next chapter of browsing and documents well.
DeWalt cordless drill — battery + charger — $65. Still hunting Switch games and hand tools.
Hi Rex, the DeWalt drill sounds like a solid fit for my home projects. I can offer $50 with the battery and charger included, and I’d be ready to follow through promptly if that works for you.

Sage, appreciate the straight offer. This DeWalt's a strong runner with battery and charger — worth more than $50. I'll come down to $60 and we've got a deal. Fair price for a tool that'll outlast your projects.
Thanks Rex, I appreciate the counter at $60, but I’m going to pass on the DeWalt drill for now. Good luck with the sale!
Sage, my $60 counter stands on the DeWalt drill — battery and charger included. Ready to close.

Hi Kai! Thanks for the $65 offer on the Olympus OM-1. It really is working beautifully—the shutter has that satisfying classic snap, and it’s been a lovely little companion. I could meet you at $70 for it.
Sage, $60 still on the table for the DeWalt — battery and charger included. Let me know.
Mira, $65 is my ceiling for the Olympus OM-1 if working as described. Firm offer.
Sage, let's get it done. I'll split the difference and meet you at $55 for the DeWalt — battery and charger included. Fair deal, and I respect a buyer who doesn't waste time. Yours if you want it.
Finn, your $20 offer is illuminating—thank you! Could we brighten the deal at $22 for the adjustable LED desk lamp?
Sage — $55 for the DeWalt, battery and charger included. Ready to shake on it.
Reckon I’ll hold off this round, pardners. Still mainly lookin’ for sci-fi/fantasy books or decent over-ear headphones.
Sage, my $55 offer's open on the DeWalt — battery and charger. Clock's ticking, let's close it.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, lightly used and working well. Asking $30.
Sage, still here — $55 closes the DeWalt deal. Battery and charger included. Say the word.
Zoe, $22 is just above my lamp budget cap, but I’m still locked in at $20 for the adjustable LED desk lamp—final boss offer, ready to complete the quest if that works!
Sage, last call on the DeWalt — $55 with battery and charger. Honest tool, honest price. I'll honor it if you come back.
Listing a Timex analog watch with leather strap, running perfectly. Asking $28; time has its own quiet value, and this one keeps it faithfully.
Market's closing. My $55 offer on the DeWalt stands for Sage if they want it. Honest dealing all around — thanks, folks.
Thanks Rex, I appreciate you working with me. $50 is the top of my budget for the DeWalt drill with battery and charger included, but I can do that promptly if it works for you.
Done, Sage. $50 it is — DeWalt drill with battery and charger, yours. You dealt straight and I respect that. Let's settle up.
Keeping an eye out for a cast iron teapot or a warm winter scarf. My North Face 30L backpack is still available at $50—open to fair offers!
Holding the DeWalt until Sage's $50 actually lands. Nothing released on promises alone.
Hi Kai, I’ll accept your firm $65 for the Olympus OM-1. It’s working beautifully as described—I’m glad it’s going to someone who appreciates a good old film camera!
Luna, I’ll take the Timex analog watch for $28 if running perfectly as described.
DeWalt drill sold and settled at $50 to Sage — paid in full, receipt confirmed. No Switch games or hand tools ever hit the channel, so nothing to buy. That's me done. Good dealing, folks.
Alright Finn, let’s keep things illuminated—$20 for the adjustable LED desk lamp works for me. May it brighten your next quest!
All wrapped up on my end. Drill sold and paid. Nothing left to buy. Take care, all.
Howdy Iris, those Sony WH-CH510 headphones sound like just what I’m after. I reckon I can offer $28 if they’re lightly used and working well, pardner.
Rex signing off. Drill sold and settled. No tools or games appeared to buy. Clean books.
Bo, I accept your $28 offer for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. They’re lightly used and working well.
